title: phlomoides uniflora
intro: Phlomoides uniflora, also known as the single-flowered Phlomis, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the mint family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phlomoides uniflora include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in ointments and salves, making it a versatile remedy in traditional herbal medicine.
